content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Attached please find the business update for SCS, Lovito, and warehouse for
our discussion tomorrow. Thank you!

Best,
Jinyu

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 5

   - Our ADO increased by 5% but P&L did not improve much?
- Why did SG&A jump by 300k MOM?

New hires cannot have contributed by
   such a large amount?

Slide 10

   - Group 1 >> How would JIT help?
- Group 2 >> How would the semi-consignment work exactly?

What do we do
   vs what brands do?
What is the value that we bring here?

Slide 14

   - Not quite sure about this. Why would EL need to JIT and put on
   pre-order?
If we really believe it will sell, we should just consign it?

- Fashion I understand, EL not so much..
   - Can show which 6 catgories these actually are?

Slide 15 – 16

   - For the categories who participate in this, what is the ADO % that we
   foresee coming from pre-order?

Slide 17

   - The issue here is probably around # of assortment in general?

And that
   typically lies in our sourcing coverage as a % of CSPU ADO right?

What is
   it exactly?
And how does it compare with CB sellers?

Others

   - What is not clear to me is the ADO impact for each group/category?

And
   how exactly are we splitting up the buyers to focus on the various
   initiatives?

- If we look at overall ADO coming from
      - Increasing CSPU coverage via low price assortment
      - JIT
      - Brands
   - What is the impact of each of the above ?

What is the absolute P1
   right now?

Slide 21

   - How did we decide on what to source for here?

- With SHP matched ADI >= 2 and > 5K sold count, why are we not sourcing
   for everything?
- And what categories are these for?

Slide 23

   - How do we decide what is P0 right now?
- How is the sample check being done right now?

30 listings per cluster
   is just very little?
Scale of this feels small?

Slide 24

   - Do we have a sense of scale of listings to optimize over time?

I
   cannot quite tell impact at this time



Slide 25

   - The revised title still looks quite bad



Slide 28

   - #1 – This is for shop page right?
And not for PDP?

- #2 – Do not quite understand what we are asking for here
   - #1 – Not quite the listing title requirement we are talking about



Slide 29

   - Can explain what we mean exactly here?

Slide 30

   - #3 – Can explain what we mean exactly here?

Slide 31

   - EDT is based on cheapest model right?

I am not sure what smallest
   model ID mean



Slide 34

   - What is our point of having EDT shown here?

Slide 35

   - So it is random?
Just what model ID happens to be the smallest?

Slide 37

   - This is fine but what is our roll out plan?

For old as well as new
   listings?

Slide 42

   - For SG/MY what languages are we using for LS?
- For PH and BR, what languages are we using?

Slide 43

   - What is the % of our ADO that has video covered by either ourselves or
   affiliates right now?

For eg. in most markets the coverage is already at
   80+%



*From:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Sent:* Thursday, 15 May 2025 2:16 pm
*To:* 'Jinyu Du' <jinyu.du@shopee.com>
*Cc:* 'Ning Li' <ning.li@shopee.com>; 'Larry Lin' <larry.lin@shopee.com>;
'Chengchen Huo' <chengchen.huo@shopee.com>; 'Florence Zhai' <
florence.zhai@shopee.com>; 'Roger Yao' <roger.yao@shopee.com>; 'Jessie
Zhang' <mengqi.zhang@shopee.com>; 'Jiang Hans' <hans.jiang@shopee.com>;
'Mengxiao Yu' <william.yu@shopee.com>; 'Ran Yang' <russell.yang@shopee.com>;
'Ang Li' <ang.lee@shopee.com>; 'Amina Yin' <amina.yin@shopee.com>; 'Fan
Fan' <jacob.fan01@shopee.com>; 'Roy Lv' <roy.lv@shopee.com>; 'Lu Lin' <
lu.lin@shopee.com>; 'Charissa Li' <charissa.li@shopee.com>; 'Siqin Liu' <
siqin.liu@lovito.com>; 'Weijia Song' <vega.song@shopee.com>; 'Shuning Wang'
<shuning.wang@shopee.com>; 'Rainy Kong' <rainy.kong@shopee.com>
*Subject:* RE: [Pre-read] SCS & Lovito & Warehouse bi-weekly
update_2025.05.15



Thanks.



Slide 5

   - Our ADO increased by 5% but P&L did not improve much?
- Why did SG&A jump by 300k MOM?

New hires cannot have contributed by
   such a large amount?

Slide 10

   - Group 1 >> How would JIT help?
- Group 2 >> How would the semi-consignment work exactly?

   vs what brands do?
What is the value that we bring here?

Slide 14

If we really believe it will sell, we should just consign it?

Slide 17

And that
   typically lies in our sourcing coverage as a % of CSPU ADO right?

What is

And how does it compare with CB sellers?

Others

And

- If we look at overall ADO coming from
      - Increasing CSPU coverage via low price assortment
      - JIT
      - Brands
   - What is the impact of each of the above ?

What is the absolute P1
   right now?

Slide 21

   - How did we decide on what to source for here?

   for everything?
- And what categories are these for?

Slide 23

   - How do we decide what is P0 right now?
- How is the sample check being done right now?

30 listings per cluster
   is just very little?
Scale of this feels small?

   - Do we have a sense of scale of listings to optimize over time?

I
   cannot quite tell impact at this time



Slide 25

   - The revised title still looks quite bad



Slide 28

   - #1 – This is for shop page right?
And not for PDP?

- #2 – Do not quite understand what we are asking for here
   - #1 – Not quite the listing title requirement we are talking about



Slide 29

   - Can explain what we mean exactly here?

Slide 30

   - #3 – Can explain what we mean exactly here?

   - EDT is based on cheapest model right?

I am not sure what smallest
   model ID mean

   - What is our point of having EDT shown here?

Slide 35

   - So it is random?
Just what model ID happens to be the smallest?
